meta.source_note: Structured from the uploaded CV PDF.

profile.title: Personal Profile
profile.summary: Final-year Informatics student at UIN Sunan Kalijaga with hands-on experience in web, mobile, and system support. Skilled in Kotlin, JavaScript, TypeScript, React.js, Next.js, Laravel, Android development, WordPress maintenance, and RESTful API integration. Interested in building user-centered digital products as a Full Stack or Mobile Developer.
profile.short_summary: Final-year Informatics student focused on web, mobile, system support, and user-centered digital products.

highlights: Improved and maintained the company WordPress website by updating page structure, visual presentation, and content/UI quality.
Supported requirement analysis and development planning for internal CRM & ACM systems and a C#-based gate parking system.
Fixed bugs in Next.js and React.js applications within an Agile Scrum development workflow.
Implemented responsive UI designs into Laravel-based web pages.
Built a foundation in operating systems, computer security, artificial intelligence, algorithm theory, programming, and database design.
Completed academic software projects involving software development, database modeling, and human-computer interaction.

Developed a web-based thesis project for MySQL DDL optimization using Gemini API, featuring structured schema analysis, AI-generated recommendations, suggestion review, SQL diff preview, Docker Sandbox validation, AI self-correction, and downloadable optimized SQL output.

items.institution: Coding Camp powered by DBS Foundation
highlights: Completed a full-stack web development learning path covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Git/GitHub, Node.js, RESTful APIs, and Web APIs.
Built responsive front-end applications using browser storage, asynchronous JavaScript, accessibility principles, PWA concepts, and deployment workflows.
Developed back-end applications in the form of RESTful APIs and completed a capstone project applying integrated front-end/back-end development practices.
Completed the Mobile Development path covering Basic Kotlin, Beginner Android, Android Fundamental, Intermediate Android, AI, and Applied Machine Learning for Android Developer.

Built Android applications using Kotlin and Android Studio with Android components, UI, localization, background processing, media, sensors, location, database, testing, Firebase, and Jetpack Compose.
Completed a capstone/final project while strengthening product development, portfolio readiness, and career development skills.

items.event: Mini Hackathon: Tech For Ummah, KI-PTKIN 2025
highlights: Developed UsStuck, a web-based Islamic Q&A chatbot designed to help Gen Z users ask sensitive or socially uncomfortable questions about Islam in a private, non-judgmental interface.
Focused the project on edutech and future learning by reducing barriers to asking questions about tauhid and fiqh while presenting answers in a more approachable digital format.
Coordinated cross-division activities and managed internal-external organizational communication.
Led team meetings, planned academic events, and represented the organization to faculty and partners.

items.organization: Study Club Informatika UIN Sunan Kalijaga
highlights: Led a student technology learning community and organized weekly study sessions and coding workshops.
Facilitated peer collaboration through project-based learning and discussions on algorithms, web, and mobile development.

sections.heading: Experience
sections.body: Intern Programmer at 295 Solution and Web Developer Intern at Wesclic.

sections.heading: Education
